items.title: Welcome
items.content_text:
simple-www is ready for Markdown-backed content.

- Toggle modules in data/config.json
- Add entries in content folders
- Keep the design simple

items.title: Example project
items.content_text: Replace this file with a real project description.

items.title: First post
items.content_text: This blog module reads Markdown files from content/blog.

items.title: Downloads
items.content_text: Use this module for files, release notes, or links.

items.title: Example product
items.summary: A simple product entry without payment handling.
items.content_text: Use the store module for product listings and external product links.

items.title: Older update
items.content_text: News entries are sorted newest first.

items.title: Archive example
items.summary: A second blog post for archive and category views.
items.content_text: This entry gives the blog module another year and category to filter.
